# CTFontCollectionGetTypeID()

**Function**

Returns the type identifier for Core Text font collection references.

## Declaration

```swift
func CTFontCollectionGetTypeID() -> CFTypeID
```

## Return Value

The identifier for the opaque type CTFontCollection.
